case_title: CHUNG, AMY et al vs. GARVEY, ROSEMARY C. et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GARVEY, ROSEMARY C.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHUNG, AMY CHUNG, LUKE CHUNG, MICHAEL SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-29-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUN-04-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE PRO-TEM DAN DUNCAN, DPADILLA, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. 3:00 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLTF. PRESENT W/ COUNSEL NILS ROSENQUEST. DEFT ROSEMARY GARVEY PRESENT & APPEARING IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: DEFT HAS ALREADY VACATED THE PREMISES TODAY, RETURNED THE KEYS TO THE LANDLORD IN COURT. AGREED TO MUTUAL RELEASES OF ALL CLAIMS. EACH SIDE TO BEAR ATTYS FEES & COSTS. PLTF. WILL DISMISS CASE W/ PREJUDICE WITHIN THIS WEEK. PLTF WAIVES ALL RENTS/DAMAGES, THIS WILL BE THE FINAL RESOLUTION OF THE CASE, NO MORE PENDING LAWSUITS OR DISPUTES ARISING OUT OF THE TENANCY. NO JUDGMENT.
